blended.narrative: Mt. Seymour is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 964 ft. Looking ahead, 42 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 3.9" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
